description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!  Product DetailsCase style:  White plastic round case Dial style: White dial with white and black hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: White plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time  Waterproof to 5 BAR, allowing you to use it even when showeringWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 39 mm Case thickness: 6 mm
